description: Goal: implement the scheduler/fact substrate. Change: owned fact contributions, aggregate fingerprints, deduped queue plus queued set, dynamic reads/waits/output indexes, changed-fact wakeups, and fatal diagnostic telemetry. Check: coalescing, requeue-after-run, contribution replacement, no-change suppression, waiter wakeup, and fatal stop tests.
title: Compiler2 core: implement fact table, agenda, waiters, and fatal telemetry
